source_question: Cho tôi danh sách sinh viên đã đăng ký môn Nhập môn trí tuệ nhân tạo trong học kỳ 2023-2.
source_sql: SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.full_name, m.major_name, s.cohort_year, s.gpa FROM students s JOIN majors m ON s.major_id = m.major_id JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id JOIN course_sections cs ON e.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id WHERE c.course_name = 'Nhập môn trí tuệ nhân tạo' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-2' AND e.status = 'enrolled'

source_question: Mỗi ngành có bao nhiêu sinh viên đăng ký môn Nhập môn trí tuệ nhân tạo trong học kỳ 2023-2?

source_question: Học kỳ 2023-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2023-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Học máy còn chỗ vào Thứ 6 trong học kỳ 2025-1.

source_question: Học kỳ 2024-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2024-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Những môn nào yêu cầu đã học Nhập môn trí tuệ nhân tạo trước khi đăng ký?

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Tài chính doanh nghiệp còn chỗ vào Thứ 5 trong học kỳ 2023-2.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Tài chính doanh nghiệp' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-2' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 5%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2023-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Hệ điều hành còn chỗ vào Thứ 4 trong học kỳ 2025-1.

source_question: Học kỳ 2023-2 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2023-2' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Cấu trúc dữ liệu còn chỗ vào Thứ 3 trong học kỳ 2025-1.

source_question: Học kỳ 2023-2 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2023-2' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2023-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?

source_question: Những môn nào yêu cầu đã học Nhập môn kỹ thuật phần mềm trước khi đăng ký?

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Cơ sở dữ liệu còn chỗ vào Thứ 2 trong học kỳ 2025-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Cơ sở dữ liệu' AND sem.semester_name = '2025-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 2%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2024-2 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2024-2' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Nhập môn kỹ thuật phần mềm còn chỗ vào Thứ 3 trong học kỳ 2024-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Nhập môn kỹ thuật phần mềm' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 3%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2023-2 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2023-2' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Xử lý ngôn ngữ tự nhiên còn chỗ vào Thứ 6 trong học kỳ 2024-2.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Xử lý ngôn ngữ tự nhiên' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-2' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 6%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2023-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2023-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Học máy còn chỗ vào Thứ 2 trong học kỳ 2025-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Học máy' AND sem.semester_name = '2025-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 2%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Xác suất thống kê' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 2%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2025-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2025-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Xử lý ngôn ngữ tự nhiên còn chỗ vào Thứ 5 trong học kỳ 2024-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Xử lý ngôn ngữ tự nhiên' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 5%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2025-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2025-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Khai phá dữ liệu còn chỗ vào Thứ 6 trong học kỳ 2025-1.

source_question: Học kỳ 2024-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2024-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Những môn nào yêu cầu đã học Nhập môn kỹ thuật phần mềm trước khi đăng ký?

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Khai phá dữ liệu còn chỗ vào Thứ 4 trong học kỳ 2025-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Khai phá dữ liệu' AND sem.semester_name = '2025-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 4%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Những môn nào yêu cầu đã học Nhập môn kỹ thuật phần mềm trước khi đăng ký?

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Phát triển ứng dụng web còn chỗ vào Thứ 2 trong học kỳ 2025-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Phát triển ứng dụng web' AND sem.semester_name = '2025-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 2%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Những sinh viên nào đã qua môn Tài chính doanh nghiệp với kết quả từ B trở lên?

source_question: Học kỳ 2025-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2025-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Tài chính doanh nghiệp còn chỗ vào Thứ 3 trong học kỳ 2024-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Tài chính doanh nghiệp' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 3%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2025-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2025-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_sql: SELECT c.course_code, c.course_name, pre.course_name AS prerequisite_name FROM prerequisites p JOIN courses c ON p.course_id = c.course_id JOIN courses pre ON p.prerequisite_course_id = pre.course_id WHERE pre.course_name = 'Nhập môn kỹ thuật phần mềm'

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Tiếng Anh học thuật còn chỗ vào Thứ 6 trong học kỳ 2023-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Tiếng Anh học thuật' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 6%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Những sinh viên nào đã qua môn Tài chính doanh nghiệp với kết quả từ B trở lên?

source_question: Cho tôi danh sách sinh viên đã đăng ký môn Mạng máy tính trong học kỳ 2023-2.

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Kho dữ liệu và BI còn chỗ vào Thứ 3 trong học kỳ 2023-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Kho dữ liệu và BI' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 3%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2024-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2024-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Cơ sở dữ liệu còn chỗ vào Thứ 2 trong học kỳ 2023-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Cơ sở dữ liệu' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 2%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Những sinh viên nào đã qua môn Cấu trúc dữ liệu với kết quả từ B trở lên?

source_question: Học kỳ 2023-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2023-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Khai phá dữ liệu còn chỗ vào Thứ 2 trong học kỳ 2024-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Khai phá dữ liệu' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 2%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2023-2 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2023-2' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Phát triển ứng dụng web còn chỗ vào Thứ 3 trong học kỳ 2023-2.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Phát triển ứng dụng web' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-2' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 3%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2025-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2025-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2023-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2023-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2025-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2025-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Internet vạn vật còn chỗ vào Thứ 3 trong học kỳ 2025-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Internet vạn vật' AND sem.semester_name = '2025-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 3%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2023-2 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2023-2' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Xử lý ngôn ngữ tự nhiên còn chỗ vào Thứ 4 trong học kỳ 2024-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Xử lý ngôn ngữ tự nhiên' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 4%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2023-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2023-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Kho dữ liệu và BI còn chỗ vào Thứ 3 trong học kỳ 2025-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Kho dữ liệu và BI' AND sem.semester_name = '2025-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 3%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Nguyên lý marketing còn chỗ vào Thứ 4 trong học kỳ 2024-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Nguyên lý marketing' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 4%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Mỗi giảng viên đang phụ trách bao nhiêu lớp trong học kỳ 2023-2?
source_sql: SELECT i.full_name AS instructor_name, COUNT(DISTINCT cs.section_id) AS section_count FROM instructors i JOIN course_sections cs ON i.instructor_id = cs.instructor_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id WHERE sem.semester_name = '2023-2' GROUP BY i.instructor_id, i.full_name

source_question: Những môn nào yêu cầu đã học Mạng máy tính trước khi đăng ký?

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Nhập môn kỹ thuật phần mềm còn chỗ vào Thứ 5 trong học kỳ 2023-2.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Nhập môn kỹ thuật phần mềm' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-2' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 5%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Những sinh viên nào đã qua môn Xử lý ngôn ngữ tự nhiên với kết quả từ B trở lên?
source_sql: SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.full_name, m.major_name FROM students s JOIN majors m ON s.major_id = m.major_id JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id JOIN course_sections cs ON e.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id WHERE c.course_name = 'Xử lý ngôn ngữ tự nhiên' AND e.status = 'completed' AND e.grade IN ('A', 'B+', 'B')

source_question: Học kỳ 2023-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2023-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Kho dữ liệu và BI còn chỗ vào Thứ 3 trong học kỳ 2025-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Kho dữ liệu và BI' AND sem.semester_name = '2025-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 3%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2023-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2023-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Những môn nào yêu cầu đã học Cấu trúc dữ liệu trước khi đăng ký?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_code, c.course_name, pre.course_name AS prerequisite_name FROM prerequisites p JOIN courses c ON p.course_id = c.course_id JOIN courses pre ON p.prerequisite_course_id = pre.course_id WHERE pre.course_name = 'Cấu trúc dữ liệu'

turns.utterance: Cho biết thêm số lớp đang mở ở học kỳ 2024-2.

turns.utterance: Chỉ lấy môn có ít nhất 2 lớp đang mở.

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Học máy còn chỗ vào Thứ 4 trong học kỳ 2024-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Học máy' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 4%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Những sinh viên nào đã qua môn Xử lý ngôn ngữ tự nhiên với kết quả từ B trở lên?

source_question: Cho tôi danh sách sinh viên đã đăng ký môn Kho dữ liệu và BI trong học kỳ 2023-1.

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Xác suất thống kê còn chỗ vào Thứ 3 trong học kỳ 2024-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Xác suất thống kê' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 3%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2025-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?

source_question: Những sinh viên nào đã qua môn Hệ điều hành với kết quả từ B trở lên?

source_question: Học kỳ 2023-2 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2023-2' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Danh sách sinh viên đang chờ vào môn Học máy ở học kỳ 2024-2 gồm những ai?

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Nhập môn kỹ thuật phần mềm còn chỗ vào Thứ 4 trong học kỳ 2023-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Nhập môn kỹ thuật phần mềm' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 4%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2025-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2025-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Tiếng Anh học thuật còn chỗ vào Thứ 6 trong học kỳ 2025-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Tiếng Anh học thuật' AND sem.semester_name = '2025-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 6%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2024-2 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2024-2' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Phát triển ứng dụng web còn chỗ vào Thứ 6 trong học kỳ 2024-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Phát triển ứng dụng web' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 6%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Cấu trúc dữ liệu còn chỗ vào Thứ 2 trong học kỳ 2023-2.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Cấu trúc dữ liệu' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-2' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 2%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2024-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Xử lý ngôn ngữ tự nhiên còn chỗ vào Thứ 4 trong học kỳ 2024-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Xử lý ngôn ngữ tự nhiên' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 4%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Những sinh viên nào đã qua môn Kho dữ liệu và BI với kết quả từ B trở lên?
source_sql: SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.full_name, m.major_name FROM students s JOIN majors m ON s.major_id = m.major_id JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id JOIN course_sections cs ON e.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id WHERE c.course_name = 'Kho dữ liệu và BI' AND e.status = 'completed' AND e.grade IN ('A', 'B+', 'B')

source_question: Học kỳ 2023-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2023-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Phát triển ứng dụng web còn chỗ vào Thứ 4 trong học kỳ 2024-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Phát triển ứng dụng web' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 4%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2024-2 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Học máy còn chỗ vào Thứ 5 trong học kỳ 2024-2.

source_sql: SELECT m.major_name, COUNT(DISTINCT s.student_id) AS student_count FROM students s JOIN majors m ON s.major_id = m.major_id JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id JOIN course_sections cs ON e.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id WHERE c.course_name = 'Học máy' AND sem.semester_name = '2025-1' AND e.status = 'enrolled' GROUP BY m.major_name

source_question: Học kỳ 2023-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2023-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Những môn nào yêu cầu đã học Cấu trúc dữ liệu trước khi đăng ký?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_code, c.course_name, pre.course_name AS prerequisite_name FROM prerequisites p JOIN courses c ON p.course_id = c.course_id JOIN courses pre ON p.prerequisite_course_id = pre.course_id WHERE pre.course_name = 'Cấu trúc dữ liệu'

source_question: Học kỳ 2025-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2025-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Danh sách sinh viên đang chờ vào môn Tiếng Anh học thuật ở học kỳ 2023-2 gồm những ai?

source_question: Những môn nào yêu cầu đã học Nhập môn trí tuệ nhân tạo trước khi đăng ký?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_code, c.course_name, pre.course_name AS prerequisite_name FROM prerequisites p JOIN courses c ON p.course_id = c.course_id JOIN courses pre ON p.prerequisite_course_id = pre.course_id WHERE pre.course_name = 'Nhập môn trí tuệ nhân tạo'

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Khai phá dữ liệu còn chỗ vào Thứ 6 trong học kỳ 2023-2.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Khai phá dữ liệu' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-2' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 6%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Danh sách sinh viên đang chờ vào môn Cấu trúc dữ liệu ở học kỳ 2025-1 gồm những ai?
source_sql: SELECT s.student_id, s.full_name, c.course_name, cs.section_code, w.priority FROM waitlists w JOIN students s ON w.student_id = s.student_id JOIN majors m ON s.major_id = m.major_id JOIN course_sections cs ON w.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id WHERE c.course_name = 'Cấu trúc dữ liệu' AND sem.semester_name = '2025-1' AND w.status = 'waiting'

source_question: Mỗi giảng viên đang phụ trách bao nhiêu lớp trong học kỳ 2025-1?
source_sql: SELECT i.full_name AS instructor_name, COUNT(DISTINCT cs.section_id) AS section_count FROM instructors i JOIN course_sections cs ON i.instructor_id = cs.instructor_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id WHERE sem.semester_name = '2025-1' GROUP BY i.instructor_id, i.full_name

source_question: Những môn nào yêu cầu đã học Nhập môn trí tuệ nhân tạo trước khi đăng ký?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_code, c.course_name, pre.course_name AS prerequisite_name FROM prerequisites p JOIN courses c ON p.course_id = c.course_id JOIN courses pre ON p.prerequisite_course_id = pre.course_id WHERE pre.course_name = 'Nhập môn trí tuệ nhân tạo'

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Internet vạn vật còn chỗ vào Thứ 2 trong học kỳ 2025-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Internet vạn vật' AND sem.semester_name = '2025-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 2%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Những sinh viên nào đã qua môn Cấu trúc dữ liệu với kết quả từ B trở lên?

source_question: Học kỳ 2024-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2024-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Mỗi giảng viên đang phụ trách bao nhiêu lớp trong học kỳ 2024-2?
source_sql: SELECT i.full_name AS instructor_name, COUNT(DISTINCT cs.section_id) AS section_count FROM instructors i JOIN course_sections cs ON i.instructor_id = cs.instructor_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id WHERE sem.semester_name = '2024-2' GROUP BY i.instructor_id, i.full_name

source_question: Những môn nào yêu cầu đã học Xác suất thống kê trước khi đăng ký?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_code, c.course_name, pre.course_name AS prerequisite_name FROM prerequisites p JOIN courses c ON p.course_id = c.course_id JOIN courses pre ON p.prerequisite_course_id = pre.course_id WHERE pre.course_name = 'Xác suất thống kê'

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Nhập môn trí tuệ nhân tạo còn chỗ vào Thứ 5 trong học kỳ 2025-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Nhập môn trí tuệ nhân tạo' AND sem.semester_name = '2025-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 5%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Những sinh viên nào đã qua môn Nhập môn trí tuệ nhân tạo với kết quả từ B trở lên?
source_sql: SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.full_name, m.major_name FROM students s JOIN majors m ON s.major_id = m.major_id JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id JOIN course_sections cs ON e.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id WHERE c.course_name = 'Nhập môn trí tuệ nhân tạo' AND e.status = 'completed' AND e.grade IN ('A', 'B+', 'B')

source_question: Học kỳ 2023-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2023-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Khai phá dữ liệu còn chỗ vào Thứ 3 trong học kỳ 2023-2.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Khai phá dữ liệu' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-2' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 3%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2024-2 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2024-2' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Tiếng Anh học thuật còn chỗ vào Thứ 4 trong học kỳ 2024-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Tiếng Anh học thuật' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 4%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Những sinh viên nào đã qua môn Tài chính doanh nghiệp với kết quả từ B trở lên?
source_sql: SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.full_name, m.major_name FROM students s JOIN majors m ON s.major_id = m.major_id JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id JOIN course_sections cs ON e.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id WHERE c.course_name = 'Tài chính doanh nghiệp' AND e.status = 'completed' AND e.grade IN ('A', 'B+', 'B')

source_question: Học kỳ 2024-2 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2024-2' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Xác suất thống kê còn chỗ vào Thứ 5 trong học kỳ 2023-2.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Xác suất thống kê' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-2' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 5%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2024-2 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2024-2' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2024-2 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2024-2' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Cấu trúc dữ liệu còn chỗ vào Thứ 4 trong học kỳ 2025-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Cấu trúc dữ liệu' AND sem.semester_name = '2025-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 4%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Tài chính doanh nghiệp còn chỗ vào Thứ 6 trong học kỳ 2023-2.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Tài chính doanh nghiệp' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-2' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 6%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Cơ sở dữ liệu còn chỗ vào Thứ 2 trong học kỳ 2023-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Cơ sở dữ liệu' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 2%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Những sinh viên nào đã qua môn Học máy với kết quả từ B trở lên?
source_sql: SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.full_name, m.major_name FROM students s JOIN majors m ON s.major_id = m.major_id JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id JOIN course_sections cs ON e.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id WHERE c.course_name = 'Học máy' AND e.status = 'completed' AND e.grade IN ('A', 'B+', 'B')

source_question: Học kỳ 2024-2 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2024-2' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Tài chính doanh nghiệp còn chỗ vào Thứ 4 trong học kỳ 2025-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Tài chính doanh nghiệp' AND sem.semester_name = '2025-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 4%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2025-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Cấu trúc dữ liệu còn chỗ vào Thứ 3 trong học kỳ 2024-2.

source_question: Học kỳ 2024-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2024-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Kho dữ liệu và BI còn chỗ vào Thứ 4 trong học kỳ 2025-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Kho dữ liệu và BI' AND sem.semester_name = '2025-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 4%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Học kỳ 2023-2 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2023-2' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Nhập môn trí tuệ nhân tạo còn chỗ vào Thứ 6 trong học kỳ 2023-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Nhập môn trí tuệ nhân tạo' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 6%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Xử lý ngôn ngữ tự nhiên còn chỗ vào Thứ 3 trong học kỳ 2025-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Xử lý ngôn ngữ tự nhiên' AND sem.semester_name = '2025-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 3%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Những sinh viên nào đã qua môn Học máy với kết quả từ B trở lên?

source_question: Học kỳ 2024-2 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2024-2' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Phát triển ứng dụng web còn chỗ vào Thứ 6 trong học kỳ 2024-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Phát triển ứng dụng web' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 6%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Cho tôi danh sách sinh viên đã đăng ký môn Nguyên lý marketing trong học kỳ 2024-1.
source_sql: SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id, s.full_name, m.major_name, s.cohort_year, s.gpa FROM students s JOIN majors m ON s.major_id = m.major_id JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id JOIN course_sections cs ON e.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id WHERE c.course_name = 'Nguyên lý marketing' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-1' AND e.status = 'enrolled'

source_question: Mỗi ngành có bao nhiêu sinh viên đăng ký môn Xử lý ngôn ngữ tự nhiên trong học kỳ 2023-1?

source_question: Học kỳ 2024-1 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2024-1' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Tìm lớp môn Mạng máy tính còn chỗ vào Thứ 2 trong học kỳ 2023-1.
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id JOIN instructors i ON cs.instructor_id = i.instructor_id JOIN departments d ON i.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE c.course_name = 'Mạng máy tính' AND sem.semester_name = '2023-1' AND cs.schedule LIKE '%Thứ 2%' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.schedule, cs.room, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

source_question: Mỗi ngành có bao nhiêu sinh viên đăng ký môn Khai phá dữ liệu trong học kỳ 2024-2?
source_sql: SELECT m.major_name, COUNT(DISTINCT s.student_id) AS student_count FROM students s JOIN majors m ON s.major_id = m.major_id JOIN enrollments e ON s.student_id = e.student_id JOIN course_sections cs ON e.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id WHERE c.course_name = 'Khai phá dữ liệu' AND sem.semester_name = '2024-2' AND e.status = 'enrolled' GROUP BY m.major_name

source_question: Học kỳ 2024-2 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?
source_sql: SELECT c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity, COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS enrolled_count, cs.capacity - COUNT(e.enrollment_id) AS seats_left FROM course_sections cs JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.section_id = e.section_id AND e.status = 'enrolled' WHERE sem.semester_name = '2024-2' GROUP BY c.course_name, cs.section_code, cs.capacity HAVING COUNT(e.enrollment_id) < cs.capacity

turns.utterance: Học kỳ 2024-2 còn những lớp học phần nào chưa đầy?

source_question: Danh sách sinh viên đang chờ vào môn Kho dữ liệu và BI ở học kỳ 2025-1 gồm những ai?
source_sql: SELECT s.student_id, s.full_name, c.course_name, cs.section_code, w.priority FROM waitlists w JOIN students s ON w.student_id = s.student_id JOIN majors m ON s.major_id = m.major_id JOIN course_sections cs ON w.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN semesters sem ON cs.semester_id = sem.semester_id WHERE c.course_name = 'Kho dữ liệu và BI' AND sem.semester_name = '2025-1' AND w.status = 'waiting'
